name: GUIDED THERAPEUTICS INC
summary: Guided Therapeutics, Inc. is a medical technology company focused on developing and commercializing the LuViva Advanced Cervical Scan, a non-invasive cervical cancer detection device using biophotonics technology. LuViva scans the cervix with light and analyzes reflected and fluorescent light to identify cervical cancers and precancers painlessly at the point of care. The company targets both developing world screening markets and developed world triage applications following Pap or HPV tests.

products.name: LuViva Advanced Cervical Scan
products.description: Non-invasive cervical cancer detection device using biophotonics to scan the cervix with light and analyze reflected and fluorescent light at the point of care.

products.name: Cervical Guide (disposable calibration and alignment)
products.description: Single-use disposable calibration and alignment cervical guide required for operation of LuViva.

partnerships.description: Working with distributors in Turkey to implement government-sponsored cervical cancer screening programs.
Working with distributors in Indonesia to implement government-sponsored cervical cancer screening programs.
Working with distributors in several Central and Eastern European countries for government-sponsored screening programs.
